calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-10-2017 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Department 206 for Short Cause Trial/Prove Up.
Department 514, Judge: Stephen M. Murphy, Clerk: A. Mok. Proceedings reported by: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Mitchell B. Stein, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff NEI INVESTMENTS LLC.
No appearance by or on behalf of Defendants MODESTO WHOLESOY COMPANY, LLC. and TED NORDQUIST, AN INDIVIDUAL,
Declaration of Bill Kuzma pursuant to CCP 2009, submitted in lieu of testimony.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-10 and Henry L. Glasser dismissed without prejudice.

After evidence, Court ordered the following Judgment entered in favor of Plaintiff NEI INVESTMENTS LLC. and against Defendants MODESTO WHOLESOY COMPANY, LLC. and TED NORDQUIST, AN INDIVIDUAL, as follows:
Principal $600,000.00
Pre-Judgment Interest $171,937.30
Attorney's Fees $61,215.97
Costs $450.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $833,603.27

Judgment signed in open court.
